rationale: Elec. Code §253.095 governs punishment of corporate or labor organization agents for election offenses. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: An officer, director, or other agent of a corporation or labor organization who commits an offense under this subchapter is punishable for the grade of offense applicable to the corporation or labor organization.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict detected.
